description: As Fitz inspects the gel matrix chamber, he notices the container's label referencing 'Absolution, Montana.' Suddenly, James and Giyera's bomb detonates, releasing Hive's pathogen in the hangar. The shock triggers lockdown; Fitz, Simmons, and agents scramble desperately to escape. Simmons manages a last-second success with a clever workaround, getting Fitz to safety, but others are not as fortunate as Primitives are created inside the hangar.

transcript.line: Gel's stable. Power's strong enough for transport. Um, make sure you reconnect that once it's inside and secure.
You got it.
When's the bloody hangar door gonna get closed, O'Brien?
We've got engineers on it. We had to wait a few days. Parts were delayed.
O'Brien! Wait!
What is it? What's happening?
Jemma, there was an explosion in the hangar.
Fitz. Okay. What do we do?
Let's get out of here! Aah!
No! No, no, no, no! The lockdown. Hey! Hey, help!
They're trapped inside.
Can we override the doors?
We put everything on lockdown. By the time we override, Fitz will be... Fitz, do you read?
Yeah! Sir, I'm in a bit of trouble!
We know. We're gonna get you out of there.
No, no, no, no! Stay away from them! Stay away from the gas! We have to get out of the hangar!
Come on.
No, no, no. There's nothing you can do for them. We have to get back out to the base.
Hey! How are you doing in there?!
Fitz, it's the lockdown. We can't...
The motion sensors! You have to get them working again.
If we isolate them from the system, can we get around the lockdown?
Yes! You can fry the bridging, which connects the sensor system to the security protocol!
I can do that.
No, the server system is on the other side of the base. It won't work.
Well, we need to do something fast.
Fitz, Professor Vaughn's Third Year Compiler Theory?
Yeah! Yeah! Do that! Fast, please!
I'm not an engineer. I hope I can recreate what you did there.
No, no, no! You saw me do it! You have a good memory! I mean, you do, right?
Hey, it's open! It's open!
Thank you, Jemma.
What the hell is Professor Vaughn's Third Year Compiler Theory?
It's complicated.
Well, that's not good.
If Hive gets out of stasis...
It's not an “if.”
No. It's not. At least we sealed off the hangar.
But there are S.H.I.E.L.D. personnel in there.
They're gone. We have to cut our losses. It's all we can do.
